evidence.snippet: NORBIT's multibeam sonar systems are built on a modular platform, enabling configuration for surface vessels, subsea vehicles and deep-water operations. From compact shallow-water solutions to depth-rated systems for ROV and AUV integration, each system is engineered to deliver high-resolution bathymetric data across demanding survey conditions.

**Sonars for subsea vehicles**
Depth-rated systems for ROV and AUV

items.notes: Multibeam sonar systems (WINGHEAD X, WBMS X, WINGHEAD B43/B44/F11/B57S/B59S) explicitly engineered for ROV and AUV integration; also used on USVs for hydrographic survey.

items.notes: GuardPoint series (underwater intruder detection sonars), SECurus (EO/IR maritime surveillance), SeaDarQ (oil spill detection radar) are ISR payloads for maritime security.

evidence.snippet:
SeaCOP Core Platform
====================
The foundation for unified maritime situational awareness

SeaCOP Core Platform is the operational foundation of NORBIT Aptomar’s offering. It integrates sensor inputs, structures operational intelligence, and gives operators a configurable environment for monitoring, decision-making, and coordinated response.
By consolidating relevant operational data into one system, SeaCOP helps organizations reduce ambiguity, improve response times, and manage surveillance, environmental monitoring, and operational governance through a single platform.

items.notes: SeaCOP Core Platform integrates sensor inputs for maritime situational awareness, monitoring, and coordinated response — a maritime C2/ground-segment equivalent.

items.notes: DCT Autopilot is an autopilot solution for USV/ASV.

evidence.snippet: NORBIT ASA Stiklestadveien 1, 7041 Trondheim, Norway
*   Payload electronics for unmanned systems (air, surface, subsea, land)

**Sonars for subsea vehicles**
Depth-rated systems for ROV and AUV

NORBIT’s extensive R&D expertise has led to the development of these cutting-edge multibeam sonar systems, designed from the ground up to offer new technology solutions for a wide range of applications, from small USVs to large vessel hull mounts, providing unparalleled data accuracy in the most demanding underwater environments.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells sonar subsystems (WINGHEAD/WBMS series) for ROV/AUV/USV integration, a DCT Autopilot for USV/ASV, and explicitly provides payload electronics for unmanned systems (air, surface, subsea, land) via their PIR contract manufacturing segment.

NORTrace
========
NORBIT’s ultimate Sonar Performance Prediction tool for estimating sonar performance under changing acoustical, oceanographic and meteorological conditions.

ndaa.notes: No NDAA Section 848/889 claims found in the corpus. Norwegian OEM; NDAA compliance claims are uncommon for non-US suppliers.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS claims found in the corpus.

evidence.snippet:
Highly automated, scalable production
-------------------------------------
Cutting-edge production capacity powered by next-generation machinery. Close to 25 MEUR invested in advanced systems since 2020 - ensuring precision, efficiency, and scalability in every production line.
Trusted partner for security and defence

readiness.notes: NORBIT advertises serial production with three facilities in Mid-Norway, high-volume SMT production, and ~25 MEUR invested in production equipment since 2020. Ongoing large-scale contract manufacturing programs in defence/security.

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status not disclosed (Norwegian OEM)
Blue UAS cleared list status not disclosed
Full list of PIR contract manufacturing products for unmanned systems not publicly disclosed
tagline: Manufactures integrated sensor and navigation subsystems for unmanned platforms, including synthetic aperture radar, bathymetric systems, and inertial/GNSS modules under the WINGHEAD and WBMS product lines. Norwegian firm in production-ready status with limited public visibility on U.S. defense certifications (NDAA compliance, Blue UAS status unknown) or named U.S. program integration.
